name: Persona.ly
description: Mobile-first programmatic DSP with proprietary bidder and ML for transparent app UA and retargeting at scale.

seo.title: Persona.ly — Ad Monetization / Mediation
seo.meta_description: Persona.ly: Mobile-first programmatic DSP with proprietary bidder and ML for transparent app UA and retargeting at scale.

when_to_use: Transparent app user acquisition via ML bidding DSP
Retargeting lapsed users programmatically with first-party data
Scaling iOS and Android installs through proprietary bidder

pros: Strong on SKAN and privacy-safe UA
cons: Smaller supply than Moloco or Liftoff
review.verdict: Credible transparent alternative to black-box DSPs, but scale remains the constraint.
review.best_for: Mobile marketers wanting transparency and proprietary tech at mid-market scale.
review.not_for: Top-10 advertisers needing maximum inventory density and brand-name enterprise DSPs.
